code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统画一个熔断器状态图。核心场景是LabAnalyzer调用EMR_Sync时可能失败，连续失败3次就要触发熔断。
明白，所以初始状态是CLOSED，里面包含Normal和IncrementFailures这些子状态？Threshold Reached 3 failures这个迁移条件是从CLOSED指向OPEN？
对，CLOSED内部Normal状态处理execute_trade，失败时走IncrementFailures累加计数，CheckThreshold判断count是否达到3。达到3就迁到OPEN。
好的，我先把CLOSED和OPEN两个主状态画出来，CLOSED用绿色，OPEN用红色。OPEN里面放BlockCalls和CheckTimeout，60秒超时后进入HALF_OPEN。
HALF_OPEN状态需要特别设计，这是探活阶段。TestRecovery允许一次测试调用，成功就回到CLOSED，失败则重新OPEN。成功时要连到HealthTech_PatientRecords。
确认一下，HALF_OPEN用黄色表示中间状态。EvaluateResult有两个出口：成功到PatientRecords然后闭合回路，失败走ReOpen回到LabAnalyzer？
没错。还有个小细节：CLOSED里成功时要走ResetCount把failure_count清零，这个别忘了。
等等，我刚才发现HALF_OPEN的入口写成了HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，但应该是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer吧？另外ReOpen的指向也需要确认。
啊对，是我笔误，HALF_OPEN的入口保持HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。ReOpen确实要回到LabAnalyzer，表示熔断器重开。
已修正。现在整个状态流转完整了：CLOSED(绿)→OPEN(红)→HALF_OPEN(黄)→CLOSED，所有阈值判断和超时逻辑都到位了。
